description: Amalgam Catalyst wine label, 9 spot colors + overprint. First golden corpus fixture — seeds scripts/audit_preflight_accuracy.py. Canonical reference for what an engine regression looks like on a spot-color-heavy packaging PDF. Source: https://app.lintpdf.com/view/B6pbECLfx1k5QtZj0--3JWdjw8JoTpptUiRYJvxvcdc
